title: Day 1: Environment Setup & Tooling
objectives: Install Node.js, Java JDK, and Maven
Set up VS Code with recommended extensions

content.title: Welcome to Test Automation!
content.content: Welcome to your journey in mastering Playwright and Selenium! Today, we'll set up your development environment and run your first automated tests.

content.title: Prerequisites
content.content:
Before we begin, make sure you have:

- A computer with at least 8GB RAM
- Stable internet connection
- Administrator access to install software

content.title: Step 1: Install Node.js
content.content: Node.js is required for Playwright and modern JavaScript development.

content.code:
# Check if Node.js is installed
node --version

# Should show v20.x.x or higher
npm --version
content.caption: Verify Node.js installation

content.title: Step 2: Install Java JDK
content.content: Java Development Kit is required for Selenium with Java.

content.code:
# Check Java installation
java -version

# Should show version 17 or higher
content.caption: Verify Java installation

content.title: Step 3: Install Maven
content.content: Maven is a build tool for Java projects.

content.code:
# Check Maven installation
mvn --version

# Should show Maven 3.9.x or higher
content.caption: Verify Maven installation
